heading: Why book the category through us, not direct

cards.title: We check the reef, not just the brochure
cards.text: Some resorts look identical in photos but have very different house reef quality — the thing that actually matters if snorkeling is part of your trip.

cards.title: Transfer matched to your flight
cards.text: A premium resort with a seaplane transfer can add real cost and a full afternoon if your flight lands late. We check this before recommending it.

cards.title: One total price, every category
cards.text: Room, transfer, tax, service charge, and meal plan — shown together, whichever tier you choose.
